# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent {
        label 'master' // Runs on the master node only
    }
    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                // Perform build using Maven, Gradle or other build tools
                sh 'mvn clean package'
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                // Run tests using JUnit, TestNG or other test frameworks
                sh 'mvn test'
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                branch 'master' // Only deploys on the master branch
            }
            steps {
                // Perform deployment using scp, rsync or other deployment tools
                sh 'rsync --archive ./target/ myuser@myserver:/path/to/deploy/'
            }
        }
    }
}
